title: Age Of Empires IV Minecraft Edition
description: Age of Empires IV style structure custom generation datapack. Made by ZhengSZ
body:
# Age of Empires IV style structure custom generation datapack.

### 帝国时代IV文明风格自定义结构数据包
### Age of Empires IV Civilization Style Customized Structure Datapack
### 
### 原型来自《帝国时代4》
### The prototype is from "Age of Empires IV" 
### 
### 简介：
### Abstract:
### 
### 帝国时代IV自定义结构数据包，已完成中国文明和朱子遗训文明！前往危机四伏的城镇拯救文明吧！将建议和错误反馈到视频评论区或私信我！
### Age of Empires IV Civilization Style Customized Structure Datapack, completed for Chinese Civilization and Zhu xi's Legacy Civilization! Head to the perilous town to save the civilization! Please send your suggestions and error feedback to the video comment section or message me!
### 
[https://space.bilibili.com/253560280](https://space.bilibili.com/253560280)
### 
### 该数据包包含十种结构：
### This datapack contains 10 types of structure.
### 
### 该结构数据包包含至少五十种建筑：
### This structure datapack contains at least 50 types of buildings.
### 
### 以税金机制和朝代机制为蓝本，设计了中国和朱子遗训的成就系统。
### Based on the taxes and the dynasty system, I've designed an achievement system for the Chinese and Zhuxi's Legacy civilizations.
### 
### 建筑群会生成僵尸村民军团，你可以剿灭他们以解放城镇，也可以选择治愈他们...
### The building complex will generate zombie villager legions. You can either wipe them out to liberate the town or choose to cure them...
### 
### 你可以在建筑群里找到作为战利品的税金，以及一个特殊的附魔：格挡，格挡可以附魔在剑类武器上，使其获得右键防御的能力。
### You can find taxes as a loot in the building complex, and a special enchantment called "Block". The "Block" enchantment can be applied to sword - type weapons, enabling them to have the ability of right - click defense.
### 
### 还有更多物品可以通过解锁成就获得。
### There are also more items that can be obtained by unlocking achievements.
